examples: Ful medames, a dish of partially mashed fava beans laced with herbs, spices, and oil, was also considered.
Ful medames, another Near Eastern food at step five in the codex process, is made from fava beans and can be served at breakfast, lunch or dinner.
Third in importance is the Broad, or fava, Bean (Vicia faba), the principal Bean of Europe.
